data.deadline_note: Article 50 transparency. Omnibus proposes: 2 Nov 2026. Trilogue in progress.
Article 50 transparency. Omnibus proposes: 2 Nov 2026. Trilogue in progress.
Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

observations.observation: RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) pipeline detected — external data is injected at inference time. Article 10 data governance requirements apply to retrieved data, not only training data. Consider: data source provenance, freshness, access controls, and bias in the retrieval corpus.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
data.remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

observations.observation: No logging detected — Article 12 requires automatic recording of events for traceability.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: AI API call detected — verify error handling is in place
data.remediation: Ensure AI API calls are wrapped in try/except. Handle rate limits, timeouts, and malformed responses. Required by CRA Annex I secure-by-design.
